sound_bird_

a remix machine for Ben

Random remix

Pick a mood and a flock, then let it build you a track. Every track has a seed, so anything you save comes back exactly as it was.

Nothing yet

press generate to make something

Flock mode

Mute a bird to strip the track back, or solo one to hear it alone. Changes apply while it plays.

No track loaded yet.

Nothing saved yet.

Build your own

Each row is a bird or a drum. Click the squares to place hits. The number next to each bird shifts its pitch in semitones, which also makes it shorter and brighter as it goes up.

The aviary

Every sound in here is a real wild recording of a real bird, made by a person who went outside with a microphone. Their names are on the cards. Click a clip to hear it.

All recordings come from xeno-canto, a library of wild bird sound shared by recordists around the world, under Creative Commons licenses. Each clip credits its recordist and links back to the original. Clips have been trimmed, filtered and level matched for use here.
Made for Ben. Go wild.
